content: If an app's declared target audience in Play Console includes children, Google Play's Families Policy prohibits transmitting advertising ID or other device identifiers for those users, and forbids interest-based/remarketing ads targeted at known under-13 users (COPPA). Any ad SDK/mediation used must be on Google's self-certified Families-ads-SDK list. Even with no ads (Zual's stated v1 plan), the same policy still restricts analytics SDKs that collect persistent identifiers -- so any future analytics addition needs a child-safe/COPPA-compliant SDK and consent flow.
